home.hero_subtitle: A powerful platform for creating, testing, and running algorithmic trading bots. Start with Binance — connect more exchanges as you grow.
home.steps_subtitle: From sign-up to your first trade in four simple steps
home.step_1_desc: Create an account with email, Google, or Telegram.
home.step_2_desc: Add exchange keys in settings — stored encrypted on the server.
home.step_3_desc: Pick a strategy, pair, and grid or DCA parameters.
home.step_4_desc: Track PnL, manage bots, and get Telegram notifications.
home.features_subtitle: Everything you need for algorithmic trading
home.feature_1_desc: Grid trading, DCA, and custom strategies — pick what fits your style.
home.feature_2_desc: Binance, Bybit, OKX — connect any exchange and manage everything from one place.
home.feature_3_desc: API keys encrypted on the server. Short-lived tokens. Full audit trail.
home.strategies_subtitle: Ready-made bot types for different market conditions
home.strategy_grid_futures_desc: Futures grid with long/short and auto-restart.
home.strategy_grid_spot_desc: Classic grid trading on the spot market.
home.strategy_dca_desc: Dollar-cost averaging on spot and futures.
home.strategy_custom_desc: Flexible configuration for your trading logic.
home.module_bots_desc: Create, filter, bulk actions, and WebSocket live updates.
home.module_exchanges_desc: Connect Binance, Bybit, and OKX with unified key management.
home.module_settings_desc: Profile, password reset, API keys, and user roles.
home.module_create_desc: Grid setup wizard, parameter validation, and past attempt history.
home.module_telegram_desc: Link your account and configure bot notification types.
home.module_auth_desc: Email, Google OAuth, and Telegram sign-in.
home.dashboard_empty: No bots yet — create your first one in minutes.
home.dashboard_guest_subtitle: Sign in to manage bots and see live PnL.
home.cta_subtitle: Create your first trading bot right now.

bots.title: My bots
bots.subtitle: Manage your trading bots
bots.no_bots: You don't have any bots yet.
bots.public_subtitle: Grid bots, DCA strategies, and exchange integrations — create and manage algorithmic bots after a quick sign-up.
bots.public_about_desc: Bots execute your strategy 24/7 on the exchange: place grid orders, track positions, and react to market moves without manual clicks.
bots.public_capability_1: Grid Futures on Binance and OKX
bots.public_capability_2: Start, stop, and close bots from the dashboard
bots.public_exchanges_desc: Connect API keys from supported exchanges. More integrations are on the roadmap.
bots.public_soon_telegram_desc: Push notifications for fills, errors, and bot lifecycle events.
bots.public_soon_history_desc: Detailed PnL charts, trade breakdowns, and export.
bots.public_soon_liquidation_desc: Portfolio-wide liquidation monitoring across all bots.
bots.public_soon_ws_desc: Real-time order and position updates in the browser.
bots.public_cta_desc: Create an account, add API keys, and launch your first bot in minutes.
bots.create_engine_warning: Bot was saved, but the exchange returned an error: {error}
bots.no_api_keys: Add an exchange API key before creating a bot.
bots.error_grid_orders: Grid orders count must be between 1 and 500
bots.error_current_price: Current price must be greater than 0
bots.error_total_balance: Total balance must be greater than 0
bots.liquidation_start_price_hint: Optional anchor price; otherwise current price or Binance ticker is used
bots.liquidation_section_desc: Estimate average entry, liquidation price, and total size if the full grid is filled. Does not create a bot.
bots.field_current_price_hint: Used when start price is empty; otherwise the backend uses Binance ticker
bots.field_total_balance_hint: Available USDT margin for the full grid check
bots.event_history_subtitle: Timeline of bot actions and engine events
bots.creation_history_hint: Use «Copy settings» to fill the form from a past attempt. Change anything and submit.
bots.creation_history_clone_error: Could not restore settings from this entry
bots.creation_history_cloned: Form filled from history. Review and submit.
bots.confirm_close: Close bot {symbol}? Positions will be closed on the exchange.
bots.confirm_redeploy: Redeploy grid for {symbol}? Orders will be cancelled and the grid will be placed again.
bots.bulk_confirm_stop_all_message: Orders will be cancelled on the exchange for every active bot. Bots will move to stopped status.
bots.bulk_confirm_close_all_message: Every bot that is not closed will have orders cancelled and positions closed on the exchange.
bots.bulk_confirm_remove_all_message: All bots will be hidden from the list. Active bots will attempt to cancel orders first.

exchanges.title: Exchanges
exchanges.subtitle: Connect and manage exchanges
exchanges.binance_desc: Largest crypto exchange by volume. Futures and spot trading, high liquidity.
exchanges.bybit_desc: Derivatives exchange focused on futures and perpetual contracts. Low fees.
exchanges.okx_desc: Multi-functional exchange with spot, futures, and options. API support.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile and account security
settings.email_readonly_hint: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if you need to update it.
settings.telegram_section_desc: Link your account to the bot and configure bot notification types.
settings.telegram_link_hint: Get a one-time code and send it to the bot in Telegram to link your account.
settings.telegram_prefs_disabled_hint: Link Telegram first to configure notifications.
settings.telegram_test_hint: Send a test message to your linked chat.
settings.password_hint: To change your password, we'll send a reset link to your email.
settings.api_keys_section_desc: Store exchange API keys encrypted on the server. Only masked values are shown after saving.
settings.api_keys_empty: No API keys yet. Add one to create trading bots.
settings.api_keys_secret_hint: The secret is sent once and stored encrypted. It cannot be viewed again.
settings.api_keys_passphrase_hint: OKX requires a passphrase in addition to the API key and secret.
settings.api_keys_delete_confirm: Remove the {exchange} key "{label}"? Bots using this key will stop working.
settings.api_keys_error_required: API key and secret are required.

auth.name: Name
auth.error_google: Google OAuth is not configured on the server
auth.reset_password_sent: If the email is registered, a message has been sent.
auth.error_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
